translation_text: If we could renounce our sageness and discard our wisdom, it would be better for the people a hundredfold.
translation_text_raw: If we could renounce our sageness and discard our wisdom, it would be better for the people a hundredfold.

translation_text: If we could renounce our benevolence and discard our righteousness, the people would again become filial and kindly.
translation_text_raw: If we could renounce our benevolence and discard our righteousness, the people would again become filial and kindly.

chinese_text: 絕巧棄利，盜賊無有。此三者以為文不足，
translation_text: If we could renounce our artful contrivances and discard our (scheming for) gain, there would be no thieves nor robbers. Those three methods (of government) Thought olden ways in elegance did fail
translation_text_raw: If we could renounce our artful contrivances and discard our (scheming for) gain, there would be no thieves nor robbers. Those three methods (of government) Thought olden ways in elegance did fail

translation_text: And made these names their want of worth to veil; But simple views, and courses plain and true
translation_text_raw: And made these names their want of worth to veil; But simple views, and courses plain and true

translation_text: Would selfish ends and many lusts eschew.
translation_text_raw: Would selfish ends and many lusts eschew.
